Attributes.Description: Title of the course, providing an overview of its content and emphasis.
Number of academic credits earned upon successful completion of the course.
The academic department offering the course, e.g., Math, Economics.
Briefly describes the key thematic intersections and academic focus of the course, particularly emphasizing interdisciplinary aspects.
Title of the course indicating its academic focus.
Academic term during which the course is offered, such as 'Fall 2006'.
Year in which the course is scheduled or conducted.
Unique identifier of the instructor or faculty member teaching the course.
Department within the institution where the instructor teaches.
Annual salary received by the instructor, reflecting their role and responsibilities.
